W(S)end,function(c,a)local W=J(a)local z=function(z,x,H,O)return G(c,{z;x;H,O},a,W)end return z end,function(c,a)local W=J(a)local z=function(z,x,H)return G(c,{z;x,H},a,W)end return z end,function(c,a)local W=J(a)local z=function(z,x,H,O,S)return G(c,{z,x,H;O;S},a,W)end return z end,function()t=t+(-145206+145207)d[t]=327613+-327612 return t end return(l(14761434-(-556093),{}))(W(S))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[a(-179589+182210)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
